fmea_entries.failure_mode: Accepts frame with ID > 0x3F or data length 0 or > 8
fmea_entries.failure_effect_local: Invalid frame enters bus processing pipeline
fmea_entries.failure_effect_system: Downstream ECU receives corrupt data; potential actuator miscommand
fmea_entries.mitigation: Boundary tests REQ-LIN-001..003,015..017; ASan in CI

fmea_entries.failure_mode: P0 or P1 parity bit computed incorrectly
fmea_entries.failure_effect_local: PID byte has wrong parity bits
fmea_entries.failure_effect_system: Slave rejects header; master gets ErrNoResponse; safety degradation

fmea_entries.failure_mode: Incorrect parity accepted or correct parity rejected
fmea_entries.failure_effect_local: Frame with corrupt ID accepted, or valid frame rejected
fmea_entries.failure_effect_system: Wrong frame ID processed; potential wrong actuator targeted
fmea_entries.mitigation: Unit tests for accept/reject cases; protect_id/verify_pid round-trip

fmea_entries.failure_mode: Wrong checksum for classic or enhanced type; carry-around error
fmea_entries.failure_effect_system: Hardware slave rejects frame; protocol violation
fmea_entries.mitigation: Classic and enhanced checksum known-vector tests

fmea_entries.failure_mode: Data race: concurrent publish() corrupts response table
fmea_entries.failure_effect_local: Wrong payload stored; subsequent send_header delivers corrupt data
fmea_entries.failure_effect_system: Wrong sensor value propagated to actuator
fmea_entries.mitigation: shared_mutex exclusive-write; REQ-VIRT-018 ThreadSanitizer gate in CI

fmea_entries.failure_mode: Frame delivered to wrong subscriber due to filter logic error
fmea_entries.failure_effect_local: Subscriber receives frame with wrong ID
fmea_entries.failure_effect_system: Application processes wrong signal; potential miscommand
fmea_entries.mitigation: Filter isolation tests REQ-VIRT-011; multiple-subscriber tests REQ-VIRT-014

fmea_entries.failure_mode: Full subscriber channel blocks send_header, stalling master schedule
fmea_entries.failure_effect_local: LIN schedule stalls; no frames sent
fmea_entries.failure_effect_system: Total loss of LIN communication; safety degradation
fmea_entries.mitigation: Backpressure: full channel drops frame (REQ-VIRT-013); bounded Chan<T>; integrator monitors drop_count metric

fmea_entries.failure_mode: CRC computed over wrong bytes (e.g., CRC slot not zeroed before CRC computation)
fmea_entries.failure_effect_local: CRC in header does not match Receiver's recomputation
fmea_entries.failure_effect_system: All frames rejected by Receiver; system enters safe state unnecessarily
fmea_entries.mitigation: Known-vector test (CRC-16/CCITT-FALSE = 0x29B1 for '123456789'); round-trip test REQ-SAFETY-011

fmea_entries.failure_mode: Gap detection logic fails: replayed frame accepted with old counter
fmea_entries.failure_effect_local: Stale or replayed payload passed to application
fmea_entries.failure_effect_system: Actuator receives outdated command; potential hazardous output
fmea_entries.mitigation: Sequence gap unit test; first-message seeding test REQ-SAFETY-013; concurrent protect test REQ-SAFETY-014

fmea_entries.failure_mode: Schedule processed out-of-order or slot skipped
fmea_entries.failure_effect_local: Wrong frame ID polled; slave not sampled in correct slot
fmea_entries.failure_effect_system: Sensor data acquired at wrong time; safety analysis invalid
fmea_entries.mitigation: In-order iteration test REQ-MASTER-003; slot call count test REQ-MASTER-004

fmea_entries.failure_mode: run() ignores stop flag; thread cannot be joined
fmea_entries.failure_effect_local: Master thread continues running after shutdown request
fmea_entries.failure_effect_system: Use-after-free if bus destroyed first; undefined behaviour
fmea_entries.mitigation: Cancellation test REQ-MASTER-008; ASan validates no UAF after thread join

fmea_entries.failure_mode: Panic / crash on malformed or adversarial LDF input
fmea_entries.failure_effect_local: Process crash during LDF loading phase
fmea_entries.failure_effect_system: LIN system fails to initialize; startup denial of service
fmea_entries.mitigation: Fuzz-target test REQ-LDF-014; exception caught, returns partial DB + error

fmea_entries.failure_mode: Out-of-range ID (>63) silently truncated to valid range and published
fmea_entries.failure_effect_local: Wrong frame ID published; wrong slave responds
fmea_entries.failure_effect_system: Wrong actuator targeted; potential safety miscommand
fmea_entries.mitigation: Explicit range check before publish; reject test msg.id='64' REQ-ADAPT-003

fmea_entries.failure_mode: recv() blocks indefinitely after bus close; subscriber thread never exits
fmea_entries.failure_effect_system: Cannot shut down LIN system cleanly; heap / handle leak
fmea_entries.mitigation: Close signals all waiting recv() to return nullopt; lifecycle test REQ-VIRT-015

severity_scale.S2: Safety degradation — system enters safe state
severity_scale.S3: Potential hazardous output without safe state

occurrence_scale.O1: Improbable — no known instance in test / field

detection_scale.D1: Unit test / CI catches before integration
detection_scale.D2: Integration test or runtime monitor catches
